what: Read vault config and validate git remote
why: Cannot push without a configured remote
output: Vault configuration object with validated remote URL and local path

success_handling.criteria: Vault config exists in database and git remote is configured in local repository

event.message: Vault configuration is valid with remote configured

error_handling.criteria: Vault ID does not exist in database or config is missing
error_handling.action: Abort push, suggest re-registering the vault

error_handling.criteria: Local git repository has no remote origin set
error_handling.action: Abort push, suggest user configure remote

event.message: No git remote configured for vault: {vault_name}
